scripts.build: tsc && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'fs';import path from 'path';const s=path.join('src','schema','migrations');const d=path.join('dist','schema','migrations');fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(s).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(path.join(s,f),path.join(d,f)))"
